name: HWR_WLNS_USER_
description: The wellness user table stores wellness user data.

columns.Name: USER_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the wellness user table.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE_ERGONOMIC
columns.Comments: Corresponds to the ERGONOMIC_STATUS field value change

columns.Name: ERGONOMIC_STATUS
columns.Comments: This column contains the User's Ergonomic Status.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE_GUIDED
columns.Comments: Corresponds to the WELLBEING_LEVEL field value change

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the start date of the wellness user.

columns.Name: BMI
columns.Comments: This is the body mass index of the wellness user.

columns.Name: AGE
columns.Comments: This is the age of the wellness user.

columns.Name: STATE
columns.Comments: This is the state in which the wellness user is located.

columns.Name: SALARY
columns.Comments: This is the salary of the wellness user.

columns.Name: JOB_TITLE
columns.Comments: This is the job title of the wellness user.

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION
columns.Comments: This is the organization of the wellness user.

columns.Name: PROJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: This is the project type of the wellness user.

columns.Name: GENDER
columns.Comments: This is the gender of the wellness user.

columns.Name: AVERAGE_STEPS
columns.Comments: This is the average of steps per day of the wellness user.

columns.Name: PERCENT_SEDENTARY
columns.Comments: This is the percent of sedentary days of the wellness user.

columns.Name: AVERAGE_SLEEP_TIME
columns.Comments: This is the average sleep time of the wellness user.

columns.Name: AVERAGE_TIMES_AWAKE
columns.Comments: This is the average number of times awakened from sleep of the wellness user.

columns.Name: AVERAGE_VERY_ACTIVE
columns.Comments: This is the average very active time of the wellness user.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the source id of  the wellness user table.

columns.Name: TRACKING_SERVICE_SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the source id of user's tracking sercvice.

columns.Name: TRACKING_SOURCE_ADDED_DATE
columns.Comments: This column contains added date for Tracking source

columns.Name: HEIGHT
columns.Comments: This column stores the height of the wellness user.

columns.Name: HEIGHT_UNIT
columns.Comments: This column stores the unit for user height information.

columns.Name: WEIGHT
columns.Comments: This column stores the weight of the wellness user.

columns.Name: WEIGHT_UNIT
columns.Comments: This column stores the unit for user weight information.

columns.Name: WELLBEING_LEVEL
columns.Comments: This column stores the wellbeing status of the wellness user.

columns.Name: UNIT_SYSTEM
columns.Comments: This column stores the unit system selected by the user (Metric/Imperial)

columns.Name: ASSESSMENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column stores the last assessment type for well being .

columns.Name: WELLBEING_CALC_RULE_CODE
columns.Comments: This column stores the wellbeing questionnaire calculation rule for calculating overall score.

columns.Name: ERGONOMIC_CALC_RULE_CODE
columns.Comments: This column stores the ergonomic questionnaire calculation rule for calculating overall score.

columns.Name: WELLBEING_SCORE
columns.Comments: This column stores the wellbeing assessment score of the wellness user.

columns.Name: ERGONOMIC_SCORE
columns.Comments: This column contains the User's Ergonomic assessment score

columns.Name: WELLBEING_TOTAL_SCORE
columns.Comments: This column stores the wellbeing assesment total score of the wellness user.

columns.Name: ERGONOMIC_TOTAL_SCORE
columns.Comments: This column stores the ergonomic assessment total score.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
